visual_description: A man with shoulder‑length hair, dressed in a maroon jacket over a plaid shirt and blue jeans, walks down a hallway lined with yellow patterned wallpaper. He smiles and looks ahead while holding a small object in his left hand, passing a doorway on his right and a window with blinds on his left.
